problem id: 362e9e42
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01100011 -> 01100110
  10011110 -> 11001001
  01000000 -> 00000100
  01101010 -> 01000110
  11010101 -> 10101101
  11100001 -> 00101110
  00000111 -> 11100000
  10000111 -> 11101000
  01001000 -> 00000100
  01010111 -> 11100101

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 00100101
